# PHIL.103 ? Disagree and Commit

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** decision_making
**Subcategory:** disagree_and_commit
**Domain:** DECISION_MAKING
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Debate vigorously, then commit fully once decision is made

## Application
Encourage dissent during discussion, demand alignment after decision, no undermining post-decision

## Tags
philosophy, decision-making, disagree-and-commit
